The '''''Gargantuan''''' was an [[Armored personnel carrier/Legends|armored personnel carrier]] belonging to [[Garm Bel Iblis's movement|Garm Bel Iblis's private army]]. It was equipped with two powerful [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolasers]], four anti-infantry [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], and two [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generators]]. The ''Gargantuan'' could overload its shields, resulting in a blast which created a large energy shockwave 360 degrees around the battle platform; the power of the blast was directly proportional to the shield power at the time of overload. It was also vulnerable to concentrated fire, although it had backup systems to ensure the survival of at least part of the crew.

Although unclear how, Bel Iblis acquired the only prototype of the [[520 Battle Platform]] from Aratech's research facilities, halting plans for its large-scale production.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{1st}}
